---
title: "Outlines and Sketches"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Outlines and Sketches}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", eval = FALSE)
```

ImageArtR includes Sobel, Laplacian, and approximate Canny-style outlines, plus
line, pencil, and cartoon sketch styles.

```{r}
img <- read_art_image(system.file("extdata", "example.png", package = "ImageArtR"))
outline <- image_outline(img, method = "canny")
pencil <- image_sketch(img, style = "pencil")
cartoon <- image_sketch(img, style = "cartoon")
plot(outline)
plot(pencil)
plot(cartoon)
```
